steps.title: Use the surface contrast
steps.content: The casual description makes the mural sound not particularly ambitious. The phrase but in fact then reverses that impression by presenting the work as complex, dynamic, and serious.

steps.title: Name the false impression
steps.content: Choice B means clever or perceptive. Choice C means mismatched, and Choice D means showily self-important. None of those captures a modest, understated surface impression that later proves misleading. The answer is A.
